chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 645 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 24.10.2016. Mr. Sher Muhammad Laghari, State Counsel. -.-.-. None present for the petitioner. Learned State Counsel has filed comments on behalf of SSP Jamshoro and SHO P.S Kotri, respondents No.1 & 2 respectively, wherein these officials have stated that no harassment was caused to petitioner by them and the present controversy is primarily a matrimonial dispute between petitioner and private respondent No.3, who is daughter in law. It has been further stated that police officials will provide protection to petitioner whenever so requested. The present petition is disposed of with the directions to the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law without siding with any party and especially respondent No.3 and whenever petitioner approaches official respondents for protection, his request may be dealt with accordingly. JUDGE Ali Haider
